## Solve:

- [ ] Morse code interpreted with letters `A` and `B` replacing `_` and `.`. <br/>
  [Cyberchef solve](https://gchq.github.io/CyberChef/#recipe=Find_/_Replace(%7B'option':'Simple%20string','string':'A'%7D,'_',true,false,false,false)Find_/_Replace(%7B'option':'Simple%20string','string':'B'%7D,'.',true,false,false,false)From_Morse_Code('Space','Semi-colon')&)

## Flag:
